title: Vegan Fermented Meal Bowl
description: A delicious, plant-based meal bowl featuring fermented vegetables and tangy slaw.
instructions: 1. In a large skillet, heat coconut oil over medium heat.
2. Add the fermented vegetables and sauté for 5 minutes.
3. Add the shredded cabbage and grated carrots to the skillet and continue cooking for another 5 minutes.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the apple cider vinegar and tangy slaw sauce.
5. Add the prepared slaw dressing to the skillet and stir to combine.
6. Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the vegetables are well coated with the dressing.
7. In a separate pot, prepare the prep meal mix according to package instructions.
8. To assemble the meal bowls, place a scoop of the prepared prep meal mix in the bottom of a bowl.
9. Top the meal mix with the sautéed fermented vegetable mixture.
